title: QuickUnlockLedgerEntry
description: 003 §"Source of truth" — one row per vault in the per-extension-scope quick unlock ledger. Records in platform secure storage are ciphertext caches indexed by generation; **this row is the only source of truth**.

generation.description: Monotonically increasing, baked into the envelope AAD. A platform record whose generation mismatches this value is equivalent to non-existent. Disable/rotation = one atomic ledger write (`policy=false, state=Disabled, generation+1`) — the write itself is the revocation.

policy.description: User intent: quick unlock enabled or not.

state.description: Current state; errors drive state transitions, never record destruction (003 axiom).

NeedsReenrollReason.description: Why a vault fell into [`QuickUnlockState::NeedsReenroll`] (003 transition table).

oneOf.description: The platform reported `PermanentlyInvalidated` (e.g. `biometryCurrentSet` invalidation — the biometric enrollment set changed).
`kdf_generation` mismatch against the file header (002): a master-credential change or a third-party salt rotation.

QuickUnlockState.description: 003 quick unlock states. There is no `Revoked` state (generation mismatch is the revocation) and no stored "cleanup pending" state (that is a derived display state).

oneOf.description: Quick unlock is off for this vault.
A platform record at the ledger's current generation is expected to exist and be usable.
The envelope is invalid; re-enrollment happens automatically at the next successful full-credential unlock (`Enrolled(gen+1)`).
